subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath sought the Desired One and turned his face towards the Face of the Adored One, and hath severed all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا لمن قصد المقصود و توجه بوجهه الی وجه المعبود و قطع البر
subcodes.subjects: @law of pilgrimage, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment
